Sara Lázaro is a professional wedding photographer based in Barcelona, Spain. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, Sara Lázaro brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 198 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
